footer.description: Consumer goods trade and distribution from Poland across Europe and Asia. Since 2019.
footer.notice: Information on this website is for general business information only and does not constitute a binding offer unless expressly stated otherwise.

home.headline_html: Consumer goods trade, organised from the start.
home.subheadline: Sourcing, warehousing, and delivery within one disciplined B2B operating model.
home.credibility_heading_html: Structured cross-border trade coordination.
home.credibility_desc: We coordinate the stages of cross-border trade — from commercial requirements and supplier discussions to documentation, shipment preparation, and delivery planning.
home.proof_1_desc: Receiving, inventory management, cargo consolidation, labeling, and dispatch — managed in-house.
home.proof_2_title: Full export documentation and customs clearance
home.proof_2_desc: Certificates of origin, tariff classification, duty management, and regulatory compliance for EU and international trade.
home.proof_3_desc: Polish, Russian, English, Spanish, French, German, and Ukrainian — removing language barriers from every transaction.
home.proof_4_title: Active trade routes across EU and into Asia
home.proof_4_desc: Established logistics corridors serving wholesale, retail, and HoReCa buyers in multiple countries.
home.company_headline_html: Built on Trust. Driven by Trade.
home.company_subheadline: Founded in Białystok, Poland in 2019. A multilingual team of seven languages serving wholesale, retail, and HoReCa partners across Europe and Asia.
home.ops_headline_html: Sourcing. Warehousing. Delivery.
home.ops_subheadline: We consolidate goods in our warehouse in Białystok, handle all export documentation and labeling, and coordinate freight across EU borders.
home.services_subheading: We operate as your trade department — coordinating the work between suppliers, warehouses, customs, and buyers.
home.svc_1_desc: We coordinate the full export and import cycle — supplier negotiation, documentation, labeling for destination markets, customs clearance, and freight.
home.svc_2_desc: We identify and vet suppliers across European markets, negotiate commercial terms, and secure products that match your specifications and volumes.
home.svc_3_desc: Our warehouse in Białystok handles receiving, inventory management, cargo consolidation from multiple suppliers, product labeling, and dispatch.
home.svc_4_desc: Road freight across Poland and Europe. We manage consolidation, routing, transport documentation, and delivery to warehouse, distribution centre, or retail.
home.svc_5_desc: Tariff classification, duty management, regulatory compliance, and all customs paperwork for cross-border trade within the EU and beyond.
home.svc_6_desc: Complete export documentation, certificates of origin, and product labeling adapted to destination market language and regulatory requirements.
home.why_subheading: We support B2B partners with sourcing discussions, documentation, shipment preparation, and day-to-day trade communication from first inquiry to operational follow-up.
home.why_1_desc: Our team works in Polish, Russian, English, Spanish, French, German, and Ukrainian — removing language barriers from cross-border trade.
home.why_2_desc: We work with structured commercial documentation and confirm the scope, delivery terms, and formal requirements for each project individually.
home.why_3_desc: You deal with one team for sourcing, warehousing, documentation, and delivery. No fragmented coordination, no gaps between service providers.
home.products_subheading: Our trade operations span three core consumer goods sectors. We handle sourcing, compliance, and delivery — you focus on your market.
home.product_card_desc_1: Confectionery, beverages, snacks, coffee, tea, and shelf-stable foods from European manufacturers.
home.product_card_desc_2: Skincare, haircare, oral hygiene, and fragrances selected according to market needs and current commercial availability.
home.product_card_desc_3: Detergents, cleaning products, disinfectants, laundry care, paper goods, and sanitary items for retail and professional channels.
home.network_subheading: Based in Poland, we support FMCG trade projects across Europe and develop selected business relations toward Asian markets.
home.region_1_countries: Poland · Lithuania · Czech Republic · Slovakia · Germany
home.region_2_countries: France · Spain · Italy · Netherlands · Belgium · United Kingdom
home.region_3_countries: Sourcing partnerships established. Distribution routes developing.
home.process_subheading: A structured process from first conversation to confirmed delivery.
home.step_1_desc: We assess your trade needs, target markets, product specifications, and commercial objectives.
home.step_2_desc: Our team identifies suppliers and products that match your requirements, volumes, and quality standards.
home.step_3_desc: We handle commercial terms, documentation, labeling, and regulatory compliance for the transaction.
home.step_4_desc: Freight booking, customs clearance, and delivery coordination — managed by our team within the agreed scope of cooperation.
home.cta_banner_desc: Tell us what you need sourced, stored, or delivered. Our team responds within one business day.

about.hero_desc: Founded in Białystok, Poland, Eximtrade sp. z o.o. coordinates consumer-goods trade projects across Poland, Europe, and selected Asian directions.
about.story_heading: From local wholesale to international trade coordination.
about.story_p1: Eximtrade was founded in 2019 in Białystok as a company active in FMCG trade and distribution. From the beginning, we have focused on B2B cooperation and supply organization tailored to partner requirements.
about.story_p2: Over time, we expanded our work to include logistics support, trade documentation, and multilingual communication. This allows us to support partners in Poland, across Europe, and in selected international projects.
about.story_p3: Today Eximtrade coordinates trade projects involving food, beverages, cosmetics, household chemicals, and hygiene products for wholesale, retail, and HoReCa clients.
about.val_1_desc: We do not cut corners. Every deal is structured with transparency, and every commitment is honoured — no exceptions.
about.val_2_desc: International trade is unforgiving of errors. We apply meticulous attention to documentation, timelines, and compliance at every step.
about.val_3_desc: We are invested in the success of every client. Our performance is measured by your outcomes, not just our transactions.
about.val_4_desc: Trade conditions change fast. We respond with the speed and adaptability that global commerce demands, without sacrificing quality.
about.ms_1_desc: Eximtrade sp. z o.o. established in Białystok, Poland. Wholesale distribution operations begin.
about.ms_2_desc: Expanded warehouse capacity and established full logistics capability — storage, consolidation, labeling, and transport coordination.
about.ms_3_desc: Expanded distribution across European markets and established trade partnerships in Asia, building a multilingual team fluent in seven languages.
about.cta_desc: We work with wholesale buyers, retail networks, HoReCa businesses, and international distributors across Europe and Asia.

services.hero_desc: From sourcing to storage, labeling to delivery — we support the successive stages of international trade distribution so you can focus on your business.
services.svc_1_desc: We source and distribute consumer goods — food, beverages, cosmetics, household chemicals, and hygiene products — to wholesale buyers, retail networks, and HoReCa clients across Poland and Europe.
services.svc_1_b2: Cosmetics, personal care, and hygiene products
services.svc_1_b4: Flexible purchase quantities based on sales needs
services.svc_2_desc: Operations in Białystok can include storage, shipment preparation, cargo consolidation, and FMCG handling within the agreed scope of cooperation.
services.svc_3_desc: We coordinate road freight across Poland and Europe, managing the full transport chain from warehouse to destination. Our logistics team handles consolidation, routing, and delivery scheduling.
services.svc_3_b1: Road freight across Poland and Europe
services.svc_3_b4: Delivery to warehouse, distribution centre, or retail
services.additional_heading: Supporting your trade at every step
services.svc_4_desc: We prepare all export documentation — customs declarations, certificates of origin, and shipping paperwork. Our labeling service ensures products meet destination market requirements for language, ingredients, and regulatory compliance.
services.svc_4_b3: Certificate of origin and compliance paperwork
services.svc_5_desc: We guide your shipments through customs with correct tariff classification, duty management, and full regulatory compliance for cross-border trade within the EU and beyond.
services.svc_5_b2: HS code classification for consumer products
services.cta_heading: Not sure which service you need?
services.cta_desc: Tell us about your trade and we will identify the right combination of services for your situation.

products.hero_desc: Consumer goods across three core trade sectors — sourced, warehoused, and delivered to wholesale, retail, and HoReCa buyers.
products.p1_desc: We support projects involving chocolate, confectionery, beverages, coffee, tea, cookies, candy, chips, snacks, and shelf-stable foods for wholesale and retail buyers.
products.p2_desc: We source and deliver selected cosmetics and personal care products — skincare, haircare, oral hygiene, and fragrances — according to destination-market requirements and commercial availability.
products.p3_desc: Cleaning products, detergents, disinfectants, laundry care, paper goods, and sanitary items. We handle high-volume distribution with proper storage, labeling, and compliance for EU markets.
products.cta_desc: Tell us what products you need and your target volumes. We handle sourcing, compliance, and delivery.

markets.hero_desc: Operating from Białystok, we support FMCG trade projects in Poland and selected European markets while developing business relationships in Asian directions.
markets.r1_desc: Białystok remains our main operational and coordination point for projects handled in Poland. From here we manage commercial contact, documentation preparation, and delivery planning for wholesale, retail, and HoReCa partners.
markets.r1_flows_desc: Food, beverages, confectionery, cosmetics, household chemicals, and hygiene products to Polish wholesale and retail markets.
markets.r2_desc: We distribute consumer goods to European buyers through established trade relationships and logistics corridors. Our multilingual team handles export documentation, customs clearance, and freight coordination across EU borders.
markets.r2_flows_desc: Consumer goods distributed from our Polish warehouse to European wholesale and retail partners.
markets.r3_desc: In Asian markets we continue to develop sourcing and trade contacts depending on product category, client requirements, and project conditions. Our multilingual team supports communication with international partners during commercial discussions and operational planning.
markets.cta_heading: Looking for a European trade partner?
markets.cta_desc: Tell us what products you need distributed and your target volumes. We will assess how we can serve your market.

contact.hero_desc: Tell us about your trade needs. We respond to B2B inquiries as quickly as possible, typically within one business day.
contact.info_heading: We are ready to discuss your requirements.
contact.messaging_note: Also available on Telegram, Viber, and WhatsApp
contact.trust_2: Serving wholesale, retail, and HoReCa clients
contact.trust_3: Own warehousing and logistics in Białystok
contact.form_desc: Fill in your details and we will prepare an email draft for our team. It will open in your default mail application.
contact.form_note: The form does not submit data directly through the website. Clicking the button opens an email draft to eximtrade777@gmail.com.
contact.form_privacy: Please review the Privacy Policy and Cookie Policy before sending your message.
contact.form_email_fallback: If your email app does not open automatically, please write directly to eximtrade777@gmail.com.
contact.email_error: Please enter a valid email address.
contact.direction_export: Export — I want to sell to international markets
contact.direction_import: Import — I want to source products internationally
contact.direction_both: Both — I need import and export support
contact.direction_sourcing: Sourcing only — I need help finding suppliers
contact.message_placeholder: Describe your trade needs, target markets, quantities, or any questions you have.
contact.success_title: Your email draft is ready to send.
contact.success_desc: Please review the draft in your email app. If no window opened automatically, send the details to eximtrade777@gmail.com.
contact.error_msg: Please fix the highlighted fields and try again.
